about.seoDescription: Learn about Cosy Loops — handmade crochet creations lovingly crafted in the UK.
about.heading: About Cosy Loops
about.intro: We're a small, home-based crochet studio in the UK, making adorable handmade creations one stitch at a time.
about.storyText: Cosy Loops started from a love of crochet and a desire to share handmade joy with the world. Every item in our shop is carefully crocheted by hand using premium yarn, with attention to detail and a whole lot of love.
about.whatWeDoText: From cute amigurumi animals and bag charms to practical accessories like tote bags, scrunchies, and hanging planters — each piece is unique and made to last.
about.valueHandmade: Handmade with care — no mass production, ever
about.ctaTitle: Ready to find your new favourite?

notFound.heading: Oops! This page unravelled.

shipping.seoDescription: Learn about our shipping options, delivery times, and return policy for handmade crochet items.
shipping.heading: Shipping & Returns
shipping.shippingText: We ship all orders via Royal Mail within the UK. Standard delivery takes 3-5 working days. Orders over £30 qualify for free shipping.
shipping.processingText: As all items are handmade, please allow 1-3 working days for your order to be prepared before dispatch.
shipping.returnsText: We accept returns within 14 days of delivery. Items must be unused and in their original condition. Please email us to arrange a return.
shipping.damageText: If your item arrives damaged, please contact us within 48 hours with photos and we will arrange a replacement or full refund.

faq.seoDescription: Frequently asked questions about Cosy Loops handmade crochet products, shipping, and orders.
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes! Every single item is hand-crocheted by us using premium yarn. No machines, no mass production — just love and lots of stitches.
faq.a2: UK standard delivery takes 3-5 working days via Royal Mail. Please allow 1-3 additional days for us to prepare your handmade item.
faq.q3: Can I request a custom order?
faq.a3: We love custom requests! Please email us at hello@cosyloops.com with your idea and we will let you know if we can make it happen.
faq.a4: We accept returns within 14 days of delivery for unused items in original condition. Email us to arrange a return.
faq.a5: Currently we only ship within the UK. We hope to offer international shipping in the future!
faq.q6: How do I care for my crochet item?
faq.a6: We recommend gentle hand washing in cool water and laying flat to dry. Avoid machine washing as it may damage the stitches.

contact.seoDescription: Get in touch with Cosy Loops for questions about our handmade crochet products.
contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.intro: We would love to hear from you! Whether you have a question about your order, want to request a custom item, or just want to say hello.
contact.socialText: Follow us on social media for behind-the-scenes peeks, new product announcements, and crochet inspiration.
